evals.prompt: Design the profile page with account info, name update form, and password change form
evals.expected_output: profile.html template extending base.html, with CSS classes matching existing style.css patterns

evals.prompt: Create a UI for adding expenses with amount, category dropdown, date picker, and description fields
evals.expected_output: add_expense.html template with form fields, category selector using existing CSS variables

evals.prompt: Build a responsive expense list component that shows expenses in a table with category icons and delete/edit actions
evals.expected_output: Expense list HTML/CSS with table layout, category badges, action buttons, responsive design
